text:
No action required.** This is the known CLI-mode false positive — already documented in LEARNINGS.MD.

The "Connection refused 127.0.0.1:8000" error is
expected when running in CLI mode. Agents call `notify_parent` (or `add_task_trace`) which hits the
backend HTTP API, but no backend server is listening in CLI mode. Agents still complete their tasks successfully — this is not a real failure

.

**Rule applied:** `Connection refused 127.0.0.1:8000 is expected in CLI mode`
